--- revoke_usage_on_schema_named.sql
REVOKE USAGE ON SCHEMA sch1, sch2 FROM ROLE r

--- AST
&ast.Revoke{
  Privilege: &ast.UsagePrivilegeOnSchema{
    Usage:   7,
    Default: -1,
    Schemas: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 23,
            NameEnd: 27,
            Name:    "sch1",
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 29,
            NameEnd: 33,
            Name:    "sch2",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 44,
      NameEnd: 45,
      Name:    "r",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
REVOKE USAGE ON SCHEMA sch1, sch2 FROM ROLE r
